items.title: US attorney general criticised after saying all Epstein files have been released
items.dek: Lawmakers, including those who wrote the law requiring their publication, argue the release is insufficient.
items.body: Lawmakers, including those who wrote the law requiring their publication, argue the release is insufficient.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Kansas City police officer who killed 3 people has resigned, but will get a $50,000 payout
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: DNA found on glove appearing to match those in Nancy Guthrie suspect video
items.dek: The FBI says it recovered the evidence sample from the glove, which was found in a field near the side of the road a few miles from Guthrie's home
items.body: The FBI says it recovered the evidence sample from the glove, which was found in a field near the side of the road a few miles from Guthrie's home
items.author: IriLine Desk
